user_story: As an Employee, I want to select a financial year on the My LTA Reimbursement screen, so that I can view LTA claims for that tax period.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My LTA Reimbursement screen; When I choose a financial year; Then the reimbursement list is filtered to that period

user_story: As an Employee, I want to add a new LTA reimbursement, so that I can claim my leave travel allowance.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My LTA Reimbursement screen; When I click Add new LTA reimbursement and submit the details; Then a new LTA claim is created and listed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to capture travel details such as relationship, name, dates of departure and arrival and mode of travel, so that my LTA claim is complete and valid.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding an LTA reimbursement; When I enter relationship, name, date of departure, date of arrival and mode of travel; Then the claim records those travel details

user_story: As an Employee, I want to enter the claim amount and claim period, so that the correct reimbursement is calculated for the eligible period.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding an LTA reimbursement; When I enter total amount, claim period from and claim period to; Then the claim stores the amount and period

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my LTA claims with claims availed status, so that I can track how much of my LTA I have used.
acceptance_criteria: Given LTA claims exist for the selected year; When the list loads; Then each row shows financial year, total amount, claim period and claims availed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the LTA reimbursement list, so that I always see the latest saved claims.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My LTA Reimbursement screen; When I click refresh; Then the reimbursement list reloads with current data
